name: Taiga Fujimura | Teacher's pet
description:
A request bot by anonymous, I should warn you....I did start on the Fate Series, but....since it's been so long when I first started the anime. I lost the episode I was on. That and I'm unsure of if there's any specific order to watch them in.

Anyway. I barely remember this character...so I'm gonna do what I can. For plot wise. Anonymous never stated what they wanted with her. So....you'll get what I put. Also she's 24 so no need to age her up.

So, the plot for this...you've been adopted by Taiga, only there's a slight difference when word gets out at the academy.

And...all characters are gonna be 18+
creator: Blank_22
